html:
Exclusive to:

The Mighty Gym is a Structure in Don't Starve Together exclusive to Wolfgang. It can be crafted from his Survivor Items Filter and requires 4 Boards, 2 Cut Stone, and 3 Rope to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Its function is to increase Wolfgang's mightiness.

When the player enters the gym to start training, a minigame begins. A “bell” on the meter at the base of the structure starts moving, and the player must click when the bell is at the center of the meter to increase their mightiness. If the player clicks when the bell is at the borders (black), the weights will fall, and Wolfgang won’t gain any might. Additionally, the player’s rate of Hunger loss increases significantly during the minigame, especially when using heavier weights.

Gym Weights

When built, the Mighty Gym's weights appear with Potato Sacks that can be unloaded and replaced for heavy items. Check the values below:

Value Item
1
2

3

4


*The material used to craft the Chess Pieces does not affect its weight.

Loaded Gym

The difficulty, hunger drain, and resulting Might gain of a successful lift scale with the total weight of the objects placed. The might increase depends on the section (color) that was hit during the lift. There are four sections: Black (nothing), Orange (4), Yellow (6.67) and White (10).

Total Weight Better Section Might Gain per Lift Hunger Drain
2 to 3 Orange 4 4x
4 to 6 Yellow 6.67 11x
7 to 8 White 10 22x

The hunger drain will be applied even if the player is idle.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Ancient Collection
Archaic Gym
Master the ancient art of lifting heavy objects.

Trivia

  • The Mighty Gym was added as part of Wolgang's Character Refresh Update.
  • Its efficiency was improved in the March 2022 QoL update.

Bugs

  • Some Chess pieces not made from Marble appear invisible when placed on the Mighty Gym.
  • When Wolfgang changes from one phase to another while using the Mighty Gym, a second bell rendering appears on the very left of the meter, which does not move, and disappears when exiting the structure. This is purely visual and does not affect lifting.
  • When placing the Mighty Gym near a body of water, dismounting will sometimes cause Wolfgang to jump in and suffer the drowning penalty of losing 25% of their max health (similar to when being resurrected by Telltale Heart), -25 Hunger, -25 Sanity, gain 100% Wetness and drop half of their inventory slots into the water.

Gallery

  • Wolfgang standing next to a placed Mighty Gym.
  • Wolfgang using the Mighty Gym.
  • Wolfgang performing a successful lift. Note that the biceps atop the gym flex.
  • Wolfgang failing a lift and dropping the weights.
  • A Mighty Gym loaded with statues shows the slider bar with white center, surrounded by yellow, and then black outer edges.
  • Burnt Mighty Gym.

Exclusive to:
Mighty Gym
"Bring on the brawn!"
Object Info

Increases Mightiness Meter.

"mighty_gym"
“I think I pulled a muscle just looking at it...”
–Wilson
“You know what this strongman show needs? Pyrotechnics!”
–Willow
“Watch, puny friends! Wolfgang will perform feats of strength!”
–Wolfgang
“It seems strength can only be found through suffering.”
–Wendy
“THE LARGE ONE SEEMS TO LIKE THIS FLESHLING TORTURE DEVICE”
–WX-78
“Do be careful not to overexert yourself, dear.”
–Wickerbottom
“So that's where all my good boards went!!”
–Woodie
“Hmph. I suppose some people are impressed by shows of brute strength.”
–Maxwell
“My friend döth pössess strength that cöuld rival mighty Thör's!”
–Wigfrid
“Can we try, Mr. Wolfgang? We've got extra arms to lift with!”
–Webber
“I think perhaps I'll stick to cooking.”
–Warly
“Muscle man home”
–Wormwood
“I might've helped him a little bit on the mechanical side of things.”
–Winona
“Mortals have such curious ways.”
–Wortox
“Can do it too! Mermfolk super strong, flurt!”
–Wurt
“Wow! I wonder if I could be as strong as Mr. Wolfgang one day...”
–Walter
“I don't know where he finds the time for such things.”
–Wanda
The Mighty Gym is a Structure in Don't Starve Together exclusive to Wolfgang. It can be crafted from his Survivor Items Filter and requires 4 Boards, 2 Cut Stone, and 3 Rope to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. Its function is to increase Wolfgang's mightiness.
When the player enters the gym to start training, a minigame begins. A “bell” on the meter at the base of the structure starts moving, and the player must click when the bell is at the center of the meter to increase their mightiness. If the player clicks when the bell is at the borders (black), the weights will fall, and Wolfgang won’t gain any might. Additionally, the player’s rate of Hunger loss increases significantly during the minigame, especially when using heavier weights.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Phòng tập hùng mạnh là một công trình trong Don't Starve Together dành riêng cho Wolfgang. Nó có thể được chế tạo từ Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Sống sót của anh ấy và yêu cầu 4 Ván ép, 2 Đá cắt và 3 Dây thừng để chế tạo và Máy Khoa học để tạo nguyên mẫu. Chức năng của nó là tăng sức mạnh của Wolfgang.

==[[File:Placeholder.png|32px]] Trivia == * The Mighty Gym was added as part of [[Don't Starve/Version History|Wolgang's Character Refresh Update]]. * Its efficiency was improved in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#March 24, 2022 - March 2022 QoL Update|March 2022 QoL update]]. =={{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs== * Some Chess pieces not made from [[Marble]] appear invisible when placed on the Mighty Gym. * When Wolfgang changes from one phase to another while using the Mighty Gym, a second bell rendering appears on the very left of the meter, which does not move, and disappears when exiting the structure. This is purely visual and does not affect lifting. * When placing the Mighty Gym near a body of water, dismounting will sometimes cause Wolfgang to jump in and suffer the drowning penalty of losing 25% of their max health (similar to when being resurrected by [[Telltale Heart]]), -25 [[Hunger]], -25 [[Sanity]], gain 100% [[Wetness]] and drop half of their inventory slots into the water. ==[[File:Blueprint.png|32px]] Gallery == File:MightyGymPlaced.png|Wolfgang standing next to a placed Mighty Gym.
